sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82467" key="peri/flecis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-φλεξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, τοῦ ἡλίου</foreign> <sense id="n82467.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excessive</tr_> sun-<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burn</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.106</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
